subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast and firm in the Cause of God! The Ancient Beauty—may my soul be a sacrifice for His loved ones—when at the foot of the mountain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الثابت الراسخ فی امر الله جمال قدم روحی لاحبائه الفدا وقتی در ذیل جبل
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @predictions and prophecies, @business; financial; property matters, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
